GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc49336980 \h 3 1.1 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc49336981 \h 3 2. ADD C-000-EX13 CODE ID TO C-000 GLOBAL CODE PAGEREF _Toc49336982 \h 6 2.1 C-000-EX13 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc49336983 \h 7 2.2 Add Pack Cubed Directed Transaction Parameters PAGEREF _Toc49336984 \h 8 2.3 Add Task Auto Complete UI (PackCDLbl) transaction PAGEREF _Toc49336985 \h 9 2.4 Add Task Auto Complete UI (PackCDLbl) Bytes 1-25 and 26-27 PAGEREF _Toc49336986 \h 10 1 . GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 ( Global Extens ion Control ) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2. ADD C-0 0 0-EX 13 CODE ID TO C- 000 G LO BAL CODE 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000 - EX 13 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C- 000 - EX 13 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. A dd P ack  Cubed Dir ected Transaction Parameters Navigate to Transactions (Configuration) UI Search for Transaction Name = “ Pck Cubed Dir ” Configure the below parameters on the applicable EX13 transaction Click on “Parameters” Tab  Select Program Template and then select “Add”  Input the below information and hit “Save”  Click on “Transaction Parameters” again  Hit “Edit” Go to Byte 50 4 -50 4 and check the Y/N flag   Hit “Save” A dd  Task Auto Complete UI (PackCDLbl) transaction Navigate to Transactions (Configuration) UI Click “Add” Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot below . Hit “Save” A dd  Task Auto Complete UI (PackCDLbl) Byte s 1-25 and 26-27 Navigate to Transactions (Configuration) UI Search for Transaction Name = “ Task Auto Complete ” and select the appropriate record as shown below: Click on “Parameters” Tab  Select Program Template and then select “Add”  Input the below information and hit “Save”  Select “Add” again  Input the below information and hit “Save”  Click on “Transaction Parameters” again  Hit “Edit” Go to Byte 1 - 25 and input the transaction link name of the applicable EX13 Pack Cubed Directed transaction in the Parameter Value field as shown below Hit “Save” Hit “Edit” Go to Byte 26-27 and input “5” in the Parameter Value field as shown below Hit “Save”
